name: Pasta Con Fagioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve liquid from canned beans.
2. Peel and crumble sausage. Cook in a deep saucepan until it has changed color. If using a lean sausage, add a tablespoon of olive oil to the pan.
3. Add onions and garlic. Sauté until onions are transparent.
4. Add white wine and let simmer (not boiling) for a couple of minutes.
5. Add tomatoes, bring to a boil, lower heat, and add all herbs except parsley, tomato paste, pepper flakes, and canned beans. Let simmer while pasta cooks.
6. Cook fusilli al dente, drain, and stir into the bean mixture. Toss in chopped parsley and stir again.
7. Gradually add Parmesan, stirring more before serving.
